rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearances required. Counsel to address: the status of the Texas properties; the amount paid to Personal Touch Tax; the amendment requesting trustee fees (trustee changed guideline used from 1% FMV to 6% of income, objections thereto; and whether this court should retain jurisdiction over the trust. No additional notes will be sent.
